column2: Use casually with friends or fans. Example: 찐이야 = It is real.
Pretty ones, a cute subscriber nickname. Example: 안녕 예쁜이들 = Hi, pretty ones.
Again today. Example: 오늘도 왔어 = I am here again today.
Online comment. Example: 댓글로 알려줘 = Tell me in the comments.
Like button or I like it. Example: 좋아요 눌러줘 = Hit like.
Subscribe. Example: 구독 눌러줘 = Subscribe, please.
Love you in a warm community way. Example: 사랑해요 = Love you.

column1: 안녕 예쁜이들, 오늘도 왔어 (an-nyeong ye-ppeu-ni-deul o-neul-do wass-eo)
column2: Hey pretty ones, I am here again. Situation: Start your vlog in a cute style.

column1: 야, 다들 잘 지냈어? (ya da-deul jal ji-naess-eo)
column2: Yo, have you all been good? Situation: Start your vlog in a cool style.
Thanks for watching today. Situation: End your video warmly.
Tell me in the comments. Situation: Ask viewers to comment.
Hit like and subscribe. Situation: Ask for like and subscribe.
Korean text laughter. Example: ㅋㅋㅋ 개웃겨 = Haha, so funny.
Crying face in Korean text. Example: 고마워 ㅠㅠ = Thank you, I am touched.
For real in internet slang. Example: ㄹㅇ 대박 = For real, amazing.
I agree in internet slang. Example: ㅇㅈ = facts, I agree.
So funny in casual slang. Example: 개웃겨 = So funny.
That's insane, as a compliment. Example: 미쳤어 = That is amazing.
That's legit or real. Example: 이거 찐이야 = This is legit.
I agree. Example: 인정 = I agree.
Haha, so funny. Use when: React to something funny.
That's insane, amazing. Use when: React to something impressive.
